tweaks.name: Stop Windows from Watching What You Do (Telemetry)
tweaks.desc: Reduces the usage data Windows sends to Microsoft.

tweaks.name: Turn Off Bing Results in Search
tweaks.desc: Makes the Start Menu search only look at your own files, not the internet.

tweaks.name: Always Show File Extensions
tweaks.desc: Shows '.docx', '.jpg' etc. so you always know what kind of file you're opening.

tweaks.name: Stop Apps Running in the Background
tweaks.desc: Saves battery and speeds up your PC by stopping apps you're not using.

tweaks.name: Remove Annoying 'Tips & Suggestions'
tweaks.desc: Turns off the pop-up tips and ads Windows sometimes shows you.

tweaks.name: Make the Mouse Pointer Bigger and Easier to See
tweaks.desc: Great for anyone who finds the normal cursor too small.

tweaks.name: Stop Apps Auto-Opening from USB Drives
tweaks.desc: Stops apps from popping up automatically when you plug in a USB drive.

tweaks.name: Speed Up Menus (Reduce Delay)
tweaks.desc: Makes right-click menus pop open instantly instead of with a slight delay.

tweaks.name: Restore the Classic Right-Click Menu
tweaks.desc: Brings back the full right-click menu from before Windows 11's simplified version.

tweaks.name: Show Seconds in the Taskbar Clock
tweaks.desc: Adds seconds to the time shown in your taskbar clock.

tweaks.name: Turn Off the Widgets Icon on the Taskbar
tweaks.desc: Removes the Widgets/news feed icon so the taskbar stays clutter-free.

tweaks.name: Show Hidden Files and Folders
tweaks.desc: Lets File Explorer show files that are normally hidden from view.

tweaks.name: Left-Align Taskbar Icons (Classic Style)
tweaks.desc: Moves taskbar icons back to the left, like older versions of Windows.

tweaks.name: Hide the Search Icon on the Taskbar
tweaks.desc: Removes the search magnifying glass from the taskbar to reduce clutter.

tweaks.name: Turn Off Cortana
tweaks.desc: Fully disables the Cortana voice assistant.

tweaks.name: Disable Hibernation (Free Up Disk Space)
tweaks.desc: Turns off the hibernate feature and deletes its large hidden system file.

tweaks.name: Show Detailed Boot Info (For Troubleshooting)
tweaks.desc: Shows technical messages while Windows starts up - useful for diagnosing problems.

tweaks.name: Disable Sticky Keys Pop-up
tweaks.desc: Stops the accessibility pop-up that appears if you press Shift 5 times by accident.

tweaks.name: Reduce Game Bar Nag Prompts
tweaks.desc: Prevents certain pre-installed prompts from nagging you to enable extra features.

tweaks.name: Disable Windows Recall
tweaks.desc: Turns off Recall, the feature that takes periodic screenshots of your activity.

tweaks.name: Disable Copilot
tweaks.desc: Removes the Windows Copilot AI assistant from your taskbar and system.

tweaks.name: Disable Delivery Optimization (P2P Updates)
tweaks.desc: Stops Windows from uploading update files to other PCs on the internet.

tweaks.name: Disable Advertising ID
tweaks.desc: Stops apps from using a unique ID to show you personalized ads.

tweaks.name: Disable Activity History and Timeline
tweaks.desc: Stops Windows from tracking and syncing your recent activity across devices.

tweaks.name: Switch to High Performance Power Plan
tweaks.desc: Prioritizes speed over battery savings - best for desktops, less ideal for laptops on battery.

tweaks.name: Reset Network Adapters
tweaks.desc: Can fix internet connection problems. Briefly disconnects you from the network.
